_doc: Stable transponder codes (Sprint 017). A ship's transponder is the dotted nation.class.hull of these codes, plus an engine-only 'modified' bit (derived from ovr_* overrides, never displayed). NEVER renumber an assigned code — transponders are identities; new entities take a new code. Nation codes are deliberately non-sequential: 0 = unaffiliated, 1 = Sol (Solarian League homeworld), 2 = Beowulf (RESERVED for the Republic of Beowulf, not yet a nation record — see kwi #66), all others a hand-picked random-ish value in [42, 999] for a lived-in feel (revisit the range once >~50% full). Class codes are unique within their nation. Hull codes are assigned per class by the compiler (sorted ship id).
